name: GIGABYTE B650 EAGLE Motherboard - Supports AMD Ryzen 9000 CPUs, 12+2+2 Phases Digital VRM, up to 7600MHz DDR5 (OC), 1xPCIe 5.0 + 2xPCIe 4.0 M.2, GbE LAN, USB 3.2 Gen2
shortName: GIGABYTE B650 EAGLE Motherboard - Supports AMD Ryzen 9000 CPUs
description: High-end ATX motherboard supporting AMD Ryzen 9000 CPUs with DDR5 and PCIe 5.0 connectivity.
